# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# ============================================================================
# T30 - Sequential 100-Pair Orders (Baseline Throughput)
# ============================================================================
# Validates: OMS can handle sustained order flow. 100 buy-sell pairs
#            (200 total orders) for AAPL, all expected to match immediately.
# Measures: Orders per second (baseline throughput)
# ============================================================================

Reset
SenderCompId:{{SENDER_COMP_ID}}
TargetCompId:{{TARGET_COMP_ID}}
Connect:{{OMS_HOST}}:{{OMS_PORT}}

# Expect Logon acknowledgment
Wait:35=A

Message:T30 START $TIMESTAMP

# Execute the order-pair helper script 100 times
# Each iteration sends 1 buy + 1 sell = 2 orders, so 100 x 2 = 200 orders
Execute:helpers\T30_order_pair.txt:100

Message:T30 END $TIMESTAMP

Message:T30 PASSED - 200 sequential orders (100 pairs) processed

# Verify: at least 200 new-order acks received (one per order sent)
VerifyCount:35=8|150=0:>=200
# Verify: at least 100 fills received (100 buy+sell pairs match)
VerifyCount:35=8|150=F:>=100

Save:results\T30_result.txt
Disconnect
